title: Trump Misstates Facts in Charlotte Murder Case
summary: Trump's SOTU claim about the Charlotte stabbing death is false; the suspect was a U.S. citizen, not an immigrant.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the politicization of local crime and the spread of misinformation on a national stage.

title: Hayward Pool Filter Plant a Major Employer in Clemmons
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based pool filter maker, employs over 1,000 workers in Clemmons, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the importance of local manufacturing and its contribution to the regional economy.

title: Charlotte Trade Shows Focus on Brand Visibility
summary: Exhibitors in Charlotte are using custom canopy tents to maximize brand visibility and ROI at trade shows.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates marketing strategies employed by businesses to enhance their presence and attract customers.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President
summary: Charlotte-based Mosaic Capital Partners is seeking a Vice President of Business Development.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment opportunities within the local private equity sector.

title: Florence Airport Passenger Numbers Rise Despite Route Loss
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost its American Airlines flight to Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the challenges and opportunities facing regional airports in maintaining and expanding service.

title: Women Charged in Torture and Death of Girl in Charlotte
summary: Three women are charged with torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate at a Charlotte home.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a horrific case of child abuse and raises concerns about child welfare in the community.

title: Fatal Crash on I-85 Near Concord Mills
summary: A crash on I-85 South in Cabarrus County resulted in two deaths and two injuries, causing road closures.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the dangers of highway travel and the impact of accidents on local traffic.

title: Mooresville Police Search for Missing 20-Year-Old
summary: Semaya Frazier, 20, is missing from Mooresville; she may be in Iredell, Rowan counties, or Brooklyn, NY.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about missing persons cases and the efforts to locate them.

title: Teen Seriously Injured in Northeast Charlotte Shooting
summary: A 16-year-old boy was seriously injured after multiple shots were fired into a home in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of gun violence and its impact on young people in the community.

title: Pedestrian Killed in Northwest Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian died after being hit by a vehicle along Brookshire Boulevard in northwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by pedestrians and the importance of road safety.

title: Record Warmth Continues in the Area
summary: The weather forecast predicts slightly humid conditions with isolated showers and thunderstorm chances.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about current weather conditions and potential impacts on daily life.

title: Gastonia Police Locate Missing Teen Quickly
summary: Gastonia Police used the Real Time Crime Center to quickly locate a missing teen with special needs.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of technology in assisting law enforcement and protecting vulnerable individuals.

title: Missing Elderly Man Reported in Northeast Charlotte
summary: An elderly man is missing from northeast Charlotte; he was last seen along Erwin Ridge Avenue.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about the vulnerability of elderly individuals and the importance of community support.

title: Community Opposes I-77 South Toll Lanes
summary: Proposed I-77 South toll lanes face strong community opposition, especially from historically Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the social and economic impacts of infrastructure projects on local communities.

title: Silfab Solar Ceases Operations After Chemical Spill
summary: Silfab Solar in South Carolina halts operations after a second chemical spill; Flint Hill Elementary closed.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental and safety concerns related to industrial operations and their impact on public health.
